Container.Name: AppFlowy-Nginx
Container.Overview: Nginx reverse proxy — the single entry point for all AppFlowy Cloud services. Routes HTTP/WebSocket traffic to AppFlowy-Cloud, AppFlowy-GoTrue, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Admin, and AppFlowy-MinIO. Deploy last. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Description:
Nginx reverse proxy — the public entry point for the entire AppFlowy Cloud stack. Routes:
  • / → AppFlowy Web
  • /api, /ws → AppFlowy Cloud backend
  • /gotrue/ → GoTrue auth
  • /console → Admin Frontend
  • /minio/ → MinIO Web Console
  • /minio-api/ → MinIO S3 API (presigned URLs)

Before starting: Download the nginx.conf from the template repository and place it at /mnt/user/appdata/AppFlowy-Nginx/nginx.conf. Get it from: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vmalinics0/unraid-appflowy/main/nginx/nginx.conf

For TLS/HTTPS: place certificate.crt and private_key.key in /mnt/user/appdata/AppFlowy-Nginx/ssl/ and edit nginx.conf to enable the ssl listener.

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: nginx.conf
Config.Description: nginx configuration file adapted for Unraid container names. Download from: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vmalinics0/unraid-appflowy/main/nginx/nginx.conf

Config.Name: SSL Directory
Config.Description: Directory for TLS certificate and key (certificate.crt, private_key.key). Create even if not using TLS yet — nginx references the path at startup.

Config.Name: HTTP Port
Config.Description: HTTP port exposed to your Unraid host / LAN. This is the main AppFlowy access port.

Config.Name: HTTPS Port
Config.Description: HTTPS port. Only needed if you configure TLS in nginx.conf.
